name: 10oz Oil and Vinegar Bottle with Wood Caddy - Threshold™
description:
Bring an element of rustic charm to your table or kitchen countertop with this Oil and Vinegar with Wood Caddy from Threshold™. This set includes two glass bottles featuring spherical bodies with a fluted design and long necks with spouts for easy pouring. Additionally, the set comes with a wooden caddy with dedicated slots to securely place the glass bottles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
